crossing-original-bone-broth.name: Original Crossing-the-Bridge Rice Noodle Soup
crossing-original-bone-broth.description: A rich bone broth simmered for 12 hours, paired with 12 flavourful toppings and rice noodles. The broth is delicious and nutrient-rich.

crossing-spicy-sichuan.name: Spicy Crossing-the-Bridge Rice Noodle Soup
crossing-spicy-sichuan.description: Made with a signature Sichuan spicy base, featuring a rich and bold broth paired with 12 fresh ingredients and rice noodles.

crossing-tomato.name: Tomato Crossing-the-Bridge Rice Noodle Soup
crossing-tomato.description: Made with a tangy-sweet broth from fresh tomatoes, paired with 12 fresh ingredients and rice noodles.

crossing-green-peppercorn.name: Green Peppercorn Rice Noodle Soup
crossing-green-peppercorn.description: Made with a broth of Sichuan peppercorns and spicy flavours, paired with 12 fresh ingredients and rice noodles.

crossing-coconut-curry.name: Coconut Curry Crossing-the-Bridge Rice Noodle Soup
crossing-coconut-curry.description: A fragrant coconut milk and curry broth paired with 12 fresh ingredients and rice noodles.

specialty-smoked-intestine.name: Fruitwood Smoked Pork Intestine Rice Noodle Soup
specialty-smoked-intestine.description: Fruitwood-smoked pork intestine in a rich, spicy broth with tofu and konjac.

specialty-sauerkraut-fish.name: Chinese Sauerkraut Fish Rice Noodle Soup
specialty-sauerkraut-fish.description: Made with sauerkraut and fresh fish slices, paired with a unique sauerkraut broth.

specialty-sour-beef-enoki.name: Spicy & Sour Rice Noodle Soup With Beef & Enoki Mushroom
specialty-sour-beef-enoki.description: Featuring a bold, tangy, and spicy broth with tender beef slices and enoki mushrooms.

specialty-sichuan-fish-peppercorn.name: Sichuan Green Peppercorn Fish Rice Noodle Soup
specialty-sichuan-fish-peppercorn.description: Fresh fish slices in a numbing peppercorn broth with silky rice noodles.

specialty-tomato-beef-enoki.name: Tomato Rice Noodle Soup with Beef & Enoki Mushroom
specialty-tomato-beef-enoki.description: A sweet and savory tomato broth with tender beef and enoki mushrooms.

cold-couple-lung-slices.name: Beef with Chili Sauce and Cilantro
cold-couple-lung-slices.description: Premium beef and offal in a signature spicy chili oil sauce.

cold-mouthwatering-chicken.name: Cold Cut Chicken with Chili Sauce
cold-mouthwatering-chicken.description: Tender chicken topped with a bold, fragrant chili sauce.

cold-yanbian-beef.name: Yanbian Beef
cold-yanbian-beef.description: Carefully selected beef with a distinctive cured flavour.

cold-smoked-intestine.name: Fruitwood Smoked Pork Intestine
cold-smoked-intestine.description: Fruitwood-smoked pork intestine with a savoury, aromatic finish.

cold-crispy-fish.name: Crispy Sea Bream in Special Sauce
cold-crispy-fish.description: Crispy sea bream with a bright, tangy dipping sauce.

cold-celery-pig-ear.name: Celery with Pig Ear
cold-celery-pig-ear.description: Crisp celery and pig ear with a light vinegar dressing.

cold-potato-shreds.name: Potato Slices with Chili Sauce
cold-potato-shreds.description: Shredded potato with peppercorn chili oil for a tangy bite.

cold-tofu-sheets.name: Shredded Tofu with Chili Oil
cold-tofu-sheets.description: Fine shredded tofu in a rich chili oil dressing.

cold-cucumber.name: Smashed Cucumber
cold-cucumber.description: Fresh cucumber smashed and tossed with garlic and vinegar.

cold-seaweed.name: Seaweed Salad
cold-seaweed.description: Seaweed tossed with garlic, vinegar, and chili.

snack-salted-crispy-chicken.name: Salty Popcorn Chicken
snack-salted-crispy-chicken.description: Crispy popcorn chicken with a savoury seasoned crust.

snack-garlic-cartilage.name: Garlic Chicken Cartilage
snack-garlic-cartilage.description: Crispy chicken cartilage with a fragrant garlic finish.

snack-fried-tofu.name: Deep Fried Tofu with Garlic Sauce
snack-fried-tofu.description: Golden fried tofu topped with garlic sauce.

snack-fried-squid.name: Crispy Fried Squid Tentacles
snack-fried-squid.description: Lightly battered squid tentacles fried until crisp.

snack-orleans-wings.name: New Orleans Fried Chicken Wings
snack-orleans-wings.description: Chicken wings marinated in New Orleans spices and fried to perfection.

snack-roujiamo.name: Secret Recipe Chinese Burger (Pork)
snack-roujiamo.description: Slow-braised pork in a soft, freshly baked bun.

snack-crispy-ribs.name: Spicy Crispy Pork Ribs
snack-crispy-ribs.description: Crispy pork ribs tossed in a spicy, aromatic seasoning.

dessert-coconut-ball.name: Coconut Lava Ball
dessert-coconut-ball.description: Crispy shell with a warm coconut filling inside.

dessert-brown-sugar-cake.name: Brown Sugar Rice Cake
dessert-brown-sugar-cake.description: Crispy glutinous rice cake with brown sugar syrup and soybean powder.
